CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64, created_at DateTime);
SELECT hex(id) AS hex_id, hex(value) AS hex_value FROM test_table;
SELECT hex(toFloat32(value)) AS hex_float32 FROM test_table;
SELECT hex(toFloat64(value)) AS hex_float64 FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table));
SELECT id, hex(value) AS hex_value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE created_at < '2023-10-03 00:00:00') WHERE id = 2;
SELECT hex(toUnixTimestamp(created_at)) AS hex_timestamp FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (user_id UInt32, user_data String);
SELECT hex(user_id) AS hex_user_id, hex(user_data) AS hex_user_data FROM another_table JOIN test_table ON another_table.user_id = test_table.id;
SELECT hex(concat('data: ', value)) AS hex_concated FROM test_table;
SELECT hex(if(value > 3, 'high', 'low')) AS hex_if_condition FROM test_table;
